_description: Registry of all unique price feeds used across tokens.json. One entry per unique feed, grouped by type. Referenced by tokens via their pricing config.

chainlink_usdt_usd.description: USDT/USD price feed (AggregatorV3). Used for USDT and USDT0 across all chains.

chainlink_usdc_depeg.description: USDC/USD price feed (AggregatorV3). Used as depeg_check_feed for par-priced USDC on all chains.

chainlink_dai_depeg.description: DAI/USD price feed (AggregatorV3). Used as depeg_check_feed for par-priced DAI on Ethereum.

chainlink_usde_usd.description: USDe/USD price feed (AggregatorV3). Primary for USDe on Ethereum and Plasma. Also used for Aave Plasma USDe aToken.

midas_mfone_oracle.description: mF-ONE/USD Midas Chainlink-style oracle. NAV updated daily. Primary for mF-ONE (A2).

midas_msyrupusdp_oracle.description: msyrupUSDp/USD Midas Chainlink-style oracle. NAV updated 1-2x/week (~168h).

midas_mhyper_oracle.description: mHYPER/USD Midas Chainlink-style oracle on Plasma. NAV updated 1-2x/week (~168h).

chainlink_uscc_nav.description: USCC/USD Chainlink NAVLink oracle. Daily NAV/S from Superstate via Chainlink. ENS: uscc-nav.data.eth.

chainlink_pyusd_usd.description: PYUSD/USD Chainlink price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced PYUSD. ENS: pyusd-usd.data.eth.

chainlink_ausd_usd.description: AUSD/USD Chainlink price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced AUSD (Agora). ENS: ausd-usd.data.eth.

chainlink_rlusd_usd.description: RLUSD/USD Chainlink price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced RLUSD (Ripple). ENS: rlusd-usd.data.eth.

chainlink_usdg_usd.description: USDG/USD Chainlink price feed. Oracle pricing for USDG. ENS: usdg-usd.data.eth.

resolv_rlp_nav.description: RLP/USD Resolv AggregatorV3Interface. Issuer-published fundamental NAV, updated daily. Implements standard latestRoundData().

pyth_usdt_usd.description: USDT/USD Pyth price feed. Fallback for Chainlink USDT/USD across all chains.

pyth_uscc_usd.description: USCC/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for USCC (A2) on Ethereum and Solana. Also used for Aave Horizon USCC aToken.

pyth_syrupusdc_usd.description: syrupUSDC/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for syrupUSDC (A2) on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, and Solana. Also used for Aave Base syrupUSDC aToken.

pyth_onyc_usd.description: ONyc/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for ONyc (A2) on Solana. Weekly NAV updates (~168h).

pyth_usx_usd.description: USX/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for USX (E) on Solana. Also used as underlying price for eUSX (A1).

pyth_rlp_usd.description: RLP/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for RLP (A2) on Ethereum.

pyth_usdd_usd.description: USDD/USD Pyth price feed. Primary for USDD (E) on Ethereum.

pyth_pyusd_usd.description: PYUSD/USD Pyth price feed. Depeg monitoring fallback for par-priced PYUSD on Ethereum. No free Chainlink PYUSD/USD feed.

pyth_ausd_usd.description: AUSD/USD Pyth price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced AUSD on Ethereum.

pyth_rlusd_usd.description: RLUSD/USD Pyth price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced RLUSD on Ethereum and Solana. Also used for Aave Horizon RLUSD debt token.

pyth_dai_usd.description: DAI/USD Pyth price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced DAI.

pyth_usdc_usd.description: USDC/USD Pyth price feed. Depeg monitoring for par-priced USDC across all chains.

pyth_usde_usd.description: USDe/USD Pyth price feed. Oracle pricing for USDe (E_oracle) on Ethereum and Plasma.

pyth_usdg_usd.description: USDG/USD Pyth price feed. Oracle pricing for USDG (E_oracle) on Solana.

redstone_usdt.description: USDT Redstone price feed. Gas-cost fallback for USDT across all chains.

redstone_usdc.description: USDC Redstone price feed. Gas-cost fallback for par-priced USDC across all chains.

redstone_dai.description: DAI Redstone price feed. Gas-cost fallback for par-priced DAI on Ethereum.

redstone_pyusd.description: PYUSD Redstone price feed. Used for par-priced PYUSD on Ethereum and Solana.

redstone_usde.description: USDe Redstone price feed. Fallback for USDe on Ethereum and Plasma.

kraken_eth_usd.description: ETH/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for native ETH on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base.

kraken_arb_usd.description: ARB/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for ARB governance token on Arbitrum.

kraken_morpho_usd.description: MORPHO/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for MORPHO governance token on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base.

kraken_pendle_usd.description: PENDLE/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for PENDLE governance token on Ethereum.

kraken_sol_usd.description: SOL/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for native SOL on Solana.

kraken_avax_usd.description: AVAX/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for native AVAX on Avalanche.

kraken_hype_usd.description: HYPE/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for native HYPE on HyperEVM.

kraken_xpl_usd.description: XPL/USD Kraken ticker. Primary for native XPL and WXPL on Plasma.

coingecko_ethereum.description: Ethereum (ETH). Fallback for native ETH on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base.

coingecko_arbitrum.description: Arbitrum (ARB). Fallback for ARB governance token.

coingecko_morpho.description: Morpho (MORPHO). Fallback for MORPHO governance token on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base.

coingecko_pendle.description: Pendle (PENDLE). Fallback for PENDLE governance token on Ethereum.

coingecko_solana.description: Solana (SOL). Fallback for native SOL on Solana.

coingecko_avalanche.description: Avalanche (AVAX). Fallback for native AVAX on Avalanche.

coingecko_hyperliquid.description: Hyperliquid (HYPE). Fallback for native HYPE on HyperEVM.

coingecko_plasma.description: Plasma (XPL). Fallback for native XPL and WXPL on Plasma.

coingecko_reservoir.description: Reservoir (DAM). Primary for DAM (F) on Ethereum.

coingecko_giza.description: Giza (GIZA). Primary for GIZA (F) on Base.

defillama._doc: DefiLlama aggregated prices â€” last resort fallback. Combines DEX + CEX sources across all chains. Replaces per-pool DEX TWAP. API: coins.llama.fi/prices/current/{chain}:{address}. No auth required.

defillama_eth.description: ETH via DefiLlama (coingecko ID for native token).

defillama_xpl.description: XPL via DefiLlama (coingecko ID for native token).

defillama_wxpl.description: WXPL (wrapped XPL) via DefiLlama on Plasma.

defillama_vbusdc.description: vbUSDC (Vault Bridge USDC on Katana) via DefiLlama. Only depeg monitoring source â€” no Chainlink/Pyth on Katana.

issuer_nav._doc: Issuer-published NAV feeds â€” tier 2 in A2 hierarchy per Section 6.2. Used as pricing fallback when oracle feeds are stale/unavailable. Same sources also serve as verification (Section 7.3).

issuer_nav_uscc.description: USCC NAV via Superstate REST API. Daily NAV/S.

issuer_nav_onyc.description: ONyc NAV from OnRe Offer PDA on Solana. APR-based step pricing.

issuer_nav_mfone.description: mF-ONE NAV from Midas daily PDF reports on Google Drive.

issuer_nav_msyrupusdp.description: msyrupUSDp NAV from Midas weekly PDF reports on Google Drive.

issuer_nav_mhyper.description: mHYPER NAV from Midas attestation via LlamaRisk API.

_api_endpoints._description: Base URLs for REST API price adapters. Adapters read from here instead of hardcoding URLs.
